overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Bloodborne showing a hunter character traversing from an indoor library through a candle-lit cathedral hall into a gothic outdoor cityscape beneath a cosmic purple sky, ascending a grand staircase toward an ornate gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic library study with astronomical instruments

events.description: character enters narrow stone staircase ascending from the library

agents.ego_description: walking through the library past bookshelves and ascending the stone staircase toward the upper level

entered.detail: tall dark wooden bookshelves filled with books lining the left wall
brass astronomical instrument on a stand near the center table
large wooden desk with papers and objects scattered on surface
open wooden chest with items visible inside near the bookshelves
arched stone doorway leading to the staircase
lit wall-mounted candle sconces providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit gothic library filled with wooden bookshelves and an astrolabe on a central desk, then enters and ascends a narrow stone staircase flanked by stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand cathedral hall with ritual circles and candelabras

events.description: emerges from staircase into the large Cathedral Ward hall
character walks past the central lantern and continues toward the exit archway

agents.ego_description: traversing the grand cathedral hall with ornate architecture, walking between tall candelabras toward the exit

entered.detail: massive ornate archway at the far end of the hall with intricate carvings
circular patterned mosaic on the marble floor with glowing symbols
tall brass candelabras with multiple lit candles
tall brass candelabras with multiple lit candles
heavy draped fabric hanging from the walls between columns
large hanging lantern suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a vast candle-lit cathedral hall with marble floors and ornate ritual circles, walking between tall candelabras and passing under a large hanging lantern toward an exit archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cemetery street with gravestones under cosmic sky

events.description: exits the cathedral into the open air of the city streets with visible cosmic sky
ambient light shifts to purple hues from the cosmic sky phenomenon

agents.ego_description: walking through the cobblestone streets of the gothic city, observing the gravestones and architecture

entered.detail: wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the ambient light
massive gothic cathedral with pointed spires and arched windows
weathered stone gravestones and tombs in a cemetery plot
wrought iron fence with pointed tips lining the right side
leafless twisted trees with bare branches
unnatural purple and blue cosmic sky with swirling clouds

segments.scene_description: The character steps outside into a gothic cityscape with cobblestone streets and gravestones under an unnatural purple cosmic sky, passing between iron fences and dead trees with the massive cathedral looming on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with massive cosmic entity and twisted tree structure

events.description: massive twisted tree-like entity with a figure atop becomes visible
character stops and looks up at the towering entity

agents.ego_description: approaching the massive cosmic entity and looking up at the figure perched atop the twisted structure

notable_agents.action: cosmic entity perched atop the twisted tree structure, reaching down with long limbs toward the character

entered.detail: enormous gnarled tree-like structure with twisted branches reaching skyward
large humanoid figure with multiple limbs sitting atop the tree structure
tall pointed spires of surrounding gothic buildings

segments.scene_description: The character enters a plaza dominated by a massive twisted tree structure with a cosmic entity perched atop, stopping to look up at the towering figure with reaching limbs against the purple sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand ceremonial staircase flanked by statues and iron gates

events.description: character begins ascending the long outdoor staircase
approaching the large ornate gate at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase flanked by stone statues and hanging lanterns toward the upper city gate

entered.detail: long wide staircase made of stone steps ascending steeply
large stone statues of robed figures lining the left side of the stairs
large stone statues of robed figures lining the right side of the stairs
ornate iron gate with pointed arch at the top of the staircase
lit lanterns suspended from posts along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long ceremonial staircase lined with stone statues and hanging lanterns, moving toward an ornate iron gate at the top while the cosmic entity fades from view behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic confines of a gothic interior into a vast, cosmic outdoor cityscape. It begins within a dimly lit library filled with wooden bookshelves and an astrolabe, moving through a narrow stone staircase that leads upward. As the character emerges, the space opens into a vast, candle-lit cathedral hall with marble floors and ritual circles, passing under a large hanging lantern before stepping through an exit archway. The scene then shifts to the outdoors, where cobblestone streets and gravestones sit beneath an unnatural purple cosmic sky, leading the camera past iron fences and dead trees toward a plaza dominated by a massive twisted tree and a perched cosmic entity. Finally, the perspective ascends a long ceremonial staircase lined with stone statues and lanterns, moving toward an ornate iron gate as the towering figure fades into the distance.
